feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to restrict access to certain fields of upload in Mass upload apps in Fiori
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are moving towards the clean core post s/4 HANA migration and trying to make the processes standard as possible and avoid custom code changes.

There are multiple custom programs which allow users to mass update certain fields in material master according to their roles and departments. So, we have Fiori apps that cater to mass updates but giving them access to these Fiori apps will allow them to update all the fields. So how do we restrict to allow them to upload only  certain fields or do we continue to edit and cater these needs through our custom programs?

Please suggest for a best approach so we can avoid the custom code changes.

 

Thanks

Gowthami

entry.title: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount
entry.content:
cf html5-list showing 

But still unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount.
Should I wait as it is in Trial Account ?

Hence Content Manager also not showing anything 


Please find the detail.

This is regarding my trial account 7bc94454trial.
 
Here the below UI5 app
"hanaodataservices.ui5fristapponhanaodata"
is not showing in the HTML5 Application under BTP Subaccount after successful deployment to cloud foundry, cf html5-list also showing the same & I have all the role collection access, Servcices deployed and entitlement and subscription intact.
 
Please find all the required screenshots.
 
region -us10

 

 
 

 

 
 

 


Need help on the same.

entry.title: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we habe a problem with opening the Custom Fields and Logic App on SAP Fiori Launchpad. Everytime you open the app we got the error message that the system is on write protect mode. We looked in the transaction SCC4 and SE06 to look up if the system is proteceted against changes. But the system (specially) the client is not protected against changes therefore we searched the internet for similar errors and we added the fiori katalog into the roles of the user, but also without any success. 

Could anyone of you help us in this matter, we would be very appreciated. 

Best regards,

Adam

entry.title: After S4 upgrade ,style.css files are not loading for SAP ui5 apps in flp
entry.content:
Hi,

We have recently upgraded from S4 2018 to 2023, After S4 upgrade ,style.css files are not loading for SAP ui5 apps in flp, 

it is working fine in 2018, not in 2023
I have made the below changes in Manifest.json and component .js, but no luck

Kindly help,

 

Best Regards,
Supreeth

entry.title: sap ovp table with dynamic collumns
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirements is to show a collumn with the customer and the others will be the month/year dynamically. Like below:

CUSTOMER | MONTH1/YEAR1 | MONTH2/YEAR1 | .. | MONTH12/YEAR1 | MONTH1/YEAR2 | MONTH2/YEAR2 etc

Is it possble to add dynamic collumns for a sap.ovp.cards.table ? It's mandatory to be in a overview page because I have many others cards working there.

Or, if there are any other suggestions, I'm accepting too.

BR

entry.title: FIORI application issue
entry.content: I have added new role to my FIORI application for Manage Posting period but it was not fetching the data in fiori application whenever i am checking  there in FIORI application it says no matching found ?

entry.title: Universal Allocations- Insurance Company
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are an Insurance Company looking to implement Fiori Universal Allocations apps to replace our current custom allocations process. Is there anyone currently working with/for an insurance company that uses these apps and would like to connect? We are looking to discuss how another insurance company uses these apps given the state/national guidelines in insurance reporting. 

Thanks!

entry.title: when i was trying to generate fiori app through project from template in BAS in trial account
entry.content:
An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.

{"message":"@sap/fiori:app generator failed - env.on(error) An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Error: An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.","stack":"Error: env.on(error) An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Error: An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.\n\tat FioriAppGenerator._exitOnError (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/generator-fiori/generators/fiori-app-sub-generator/index.js:1:16010)\n\tat FioriAppGenerator.prompting (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/generator-fiori/generators/fiori-app-sub-generator/index.js:1:12626)"}

tried npm uninstall -g @SAP/generator-fiori,npm install -g @SAP/generator-fiori

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Hi

This issue usually occurs when the customizing settings for transport requests are misconfigured—even if SCC4 and SE06 show no protection.

 Please check:

  • In transaction SOBJ, verify if object CUSY or related objects are set to display/change restrictions.

  • Ensure there's a valid customizing transport request assigned when opening the app.

  • Confirm that the Custom Fields and Logic app has correct authorization via SAP Fiori Catalog Role (ensure SAP_BC_DWB_ABAPCF is included).

If still unresolved, kindly review detailed setup steps with experts at ***REMOVED BY MODERATION*** rel="nofollow"—they provide hands-on SAP configuration support.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Issue with User Visibility in People Picker on Manage Flexible Workflow Application
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently in the process of configuring a workflow within the Manage Flexible Workflow application. However, we are encountering an issue where no users are visible in the People Picker field. Despite ensuring that all required prerequisites as per the KBA mentioned below have been met, we are still unable to see any users listed.

0002824240 - No users available in People picker of Manage workflow application

0002869055 - No users available in Manage Workflows app - SAP S/4HANA

We have followed the standard setup guidelines and checked the user assignments, but the problem persists. Could anyone from the community suggest what could be causing this issue or any troubleshooting steps we might have missed?

entry.title: S4/HANA Fiori - Attachments - Insert Link - ERROR: URL does not pass security policy; upload failed
entry.content:
Hello!

I have this issue with URL Attachment upload and I cannot fin how to adjust "Security Policy"

How to reproduce :
Ex : Open any Freight Order in Fiori (Tiles Edit Road Freight Order)

(1) Select Attachements Tab.

(2) Select Insert

Select URL

(3) Add any URL

(4) Getting Error URL does not pass security policy; upload failed

I cannot find any SAP Notes regarding this.

And cannot find how to allow specific, or a group of website, URL's to the security policy to activate the attachement feature.

Thanks for the help

Stefan

entry.title: Enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am new to public cloud development having doubt in implementing enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud 

requirement is to store the invoice values into a custom table and and send to the invoice details to external API.

how to achieve this .

Do we have to create a BADI or any exist available in Public cloud as in ECC or S4HANA system

or do we have any other alternatives?

please suggest.

Guru

entry.title: What tips would you give an organisation planning to adopt Fiori during their S/4HANA transformation
entry.content: I have worked with different Fiori adoption projects during the S/4HANA transformation. I have a checklist of good adoption plans and bad adoption plans. But I would like to know what your takeaways are from your past projects?

entry.title: SAP UI5 version 1.71.69 will expire in Q3/2025. Will it expire before Q3 or at end of Q3/2025?
entry.content:
Hi,

It is mentioned in the website that SAP UI5 version 1.71.69 will expire in Q3/2025. Will it expire before the start of Q3 or at the end of Q3/2025? When do we need to update the version? Can someone please tell me.

entry.title: Fiori App Controller Extension: Overrides not being triggered successfully
entry.content:
I'm trying to make a simple controller extension, which would hook onto a method when user clicks a button. The name of this method is "onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1."

I've tried the following code, and several variations, trying to get a simple console.log message, but I can't get any of the methods below to trigger. Is there something I'm missing in order to get any of the below methods to trigger after their respective base controller methods are called?

 

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension',
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/OverrideExecution'
    ],

   
    function (
        ControllerExtension,
        OverrideExecution //,Dialog, Button, mobileLibrary
       
    ) {
        console.log("testing 1");
        "use strict";
       
        return ControllerExtension.extend("customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs.PopupMessage", {
            metadata: {
                methods: {
                    onclick: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },

                    onmousedown: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },

                    onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },
                }
            },
            override: {
                onclick: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                },

                onmousedown: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                },
               
                onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                }
            }
        });
    }
)
 
 
 
Manifest: 
{
"fileName": "manifest",
"layer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
"fileType": "appdescr_variant",
"reference": "i2d.eam.perfmaintjobs.manages1",
"id": "customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs",
"namespace": "apps/i2d.eam.perfmaintjobs.manages1/appVariants/customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs/",
"version": "0.1.0",
"content": [
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "@i18n"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport|C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ListReport/C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_MaintenanceJobTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_MaintenanceJobTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_setMinUI5Version",
"content": {
"minUI5Version": "1.108.38"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_app_setTitle",
"content": {},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
}
]
}

entry.title: Deploying a Fiori Adaption Project application to the Fiori launchpad in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

for a customer project, we need to modify a standard fiori application (doubtful account validation), and deploy it to the public cloud. Currently i try to deploy the application without changes, because i want to have a working deployment process, before i change things in the app.

For the deployment i followed a tutorial that seems to fit my needs:
Link 

My deployment settings in BAS look different. So i was not able to adjust everything what was mentioned in the tutorial.

When i try to select the app in the PC in the "manage launchpad space" transaction, i simply cannot select it.

Has anyone experience in doing adaption projects and public cloud deployments?

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: How can I navigate from customer line items (F0711) into the specific business partner of F3163?
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am wondering if it is possible to add a link into the "Manage Customer Line Items" app to the "Manage Business Partner Master Data" App  which jumps into the related business partner. In standard there are some links available for the semantic object "Customer" which let you jump into the specific customer directly (f.e. (F0046A) or (F0850A)) but not into the related business partner (F3163) directly out of customer line items app.

I managed to build a Launchpad Descriptor Item in the Fiori Launchpad App Manager which could let you jump into the Business Partner App. But unfortunately it does not jump into the specific Business Partner altough the CustomerID is part of the link. Do I have to maintain specific parameters in the Fiori Launchpad App Manager and if yes, which ones?

 

 

Thanks in advance and best regards!

entry.title: Not able to extend "My Inbox(F0862)" application for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I’m currently working on extending the standard My Inbox app for Purchase Requisition approvals in S/4HANA 2022. The main requirement is to display a list of approvers in the approval detail screen of the app.

I have followed the steps from these SAP Community blogs:
Fiori My Inbox 2.0 – Extend Approve Purchase Order – S/4HANA 1610
Extend My Inbox 2.0 Purchase Requisition S/4 Hana

What I’ve Done:

  • Extended standard CDS views:
    • C_PurRequisitionFs
    • C_PurRequisitionItemFs
    • Added the required fields and defined @ui annotations like UI.LineItem and UI.Identification
  • Verified that the new fields are available in:
    • OData $metadata
    • Annotations preview (/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/catalogservice;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='C_PURREQUISITION_FS_ANNO_MDL',Version='0001')/$value)

Issue:

Although the fields appear correctly in the metadata and annotation files, they are not displayed in the UI of the My Inbox app(Purchase Requisition Approval).

What I’ve Verified:

  • CDS annotations are correctly defined
  • OData metadata is refreshed and active

Question:

Has anyone implemented a similar approver list extension for this scenario successfully?

Any suggestions or shared experiences would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you!

entry.title: F2071 create notification while saving Creating operations are disabled for entity 'EAM_OBJPG_MAINTN
entry.content:
Hi experts,

In F2071 there is a hidden button 'create', we can make it visible via adapt-ui

When we click on 'create' and try to save the notification the following message appears


Creating operations are disabled for entity 'EAM_OBJPG_MAINTNOTIFICATION~C_OBJPGMAINTNOTIFICATI'
Found note 3155352 , but this one is old from 2022.

app details

When we check the /sap/opu/odata/sap/EAM_OBJPG_MAINTNOTIFICATION_SRV/$metadata , and search for 'sap:creatable=',  we see a lot of sap:creatable="false" (336 times)

Does anyone know if it's possible to make it workable? Or is this the reason why the button is hidden?  😁

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Adapt Filters Fiori could not work (No Data)
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have been facing issue that related with Fiori Adapt Filters, especially on Visual Filter,

When I try to use Adapt Filters, it just displays "No Data", How should I do to resolve this issue?
Whereas, The service has been active, and I have tested with SAP Gateway Client the result was 200 Success 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZSYARD27V_ALP'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@OData.publish: true
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS for ALP'


//Logic for KPI card
@UI.selectionPresentationVariant: [
{
//The below qualifier will be there in my mainfest.json file
qualifier: 'KPIORDDIV',
presentationVariantQualifier: 'KPIORDDIVPV',
selectionVariantQualifier: 'KPIORDDIVSEL'
},

{
qualifier: 'KPIORDDIV1',
presentationVariantQualifier: 'KPIORDDIVPV1',
selectionVariantQualifier: 'KPIORDDIVSEL1'
}
]


//Logic for Default Chart w.r.t Sales Organization
@UI.chart: [
{
qualifier: 'chartDefault',
chartType: #COLUMN,
description: 'Sales Information',
dimensions: ['salesorg'],
measures: ['order_qty_total_val'],  //We have to use the Alias Name as Measure in case if we have given so
dimensionAttributes: [{dimension: 'salesorg', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{measure: 'order_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_1 }]
},
//Below logic will be for Chart w.r.t Visual Filter
{
qualifier: 'visualDivision',
chartType: #DONUT,
description: 'Division Description',
dimensions: ['divisiondesc'],
measures: ['order_qty_total_val'],
dimensionAttributes: [{dimension: 'divisiondesc', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{measure: 'order_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_1 }]
},

//The below Visual Filter is from KPI perspective and not from Visual Filter Perspective
{
qualifier: 'visualDivision1',
chartType: #LINE,
description: 'Division Description',
dimensions: ['divisiondesc'],
measures: ['open_qty_total_val'],
dimensionAttributes: [{dimension: 'divisiondesc', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{measure: 'open_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_1 }]
},

{
qualifier: 'visualDistribution',
chartType: #BAR,
description: 'Distribution Channel Description',
dimensions: ['distchldesc'],
measures: ['order_qty_total_val'],
dimensionAttributes: [{dimension: 'distchldesc', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{measure: 'order_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_1 }]
},

{
qualifier: 'VisualPlantDesc',
chartType: #LINE,
description: 'Filter by Plant Description',
dimensions: ['plantdesc'],
measures: ['order_qty_total_val'],
dimensionAttributes: [{ dimension: 'plantdesc', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{ measure: 'order_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_2 }]
},

{
qualifier: 'visualMonthYear',
chartType: #LINE,
description: 'Sales by Month-Year',
dimensions: ['document_date'],
measures: ['order_qty_total_val'],
dimensionAttributes: [{dimension: 'document_date', role: #CATEGORY }],
measureAttributes: [{measure: 'order_qty_total_val', role: #AXIS_1 }]
}

]

// Presentationvariant -> This is required to generate the UI layout; Without which we wont be able to see
//   the Default Chart
@UI.presentationVariant: [
{
//The qualifier name inside Visualizations have to be same as that give for @ui.chart...and the other main qualifier
//  has to be maintained in the manifest.json file under Settings under pages
qualifier: 'Default', visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'chartDefault' }]
},
//Here we will start adding the Visual Filter Chart Qualifier as in the Presentation Variant Qualifier
{
qualifier: 'PresentationVisualDiv', visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'visualDivision' }]
},

{
qualifier: 'presentationVisualDist', visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'visualDistribution' }]
},

 {
 qualifier: 'PresentationVisualPlnt', visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'VisualPlantDesc' }]
 },

{
qualifier: 'presentationMonthYear', sortOrder: [{ by: 'document_date',direction: #ASC }],
visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'visualMonthYear' }]
},

//The below logic is for KPI card
{
qualifier: 'KPIORDDIVPV',
//The below text is optional as I didn't find any impact in UI
//text: 'KPI: Order Qty by Division',
//The KPI chart w.r.t Dimension will be same as that of Visual Filter
visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'visualDivision' },
{type: #AS_DATAPOINT, qualifier: 'order_qty_total_val' }]
},

//Logic for 2nd KPI card
{
qualifier: 'KPIORDDIVPV1',
visualizations: [{type: #AS_CHART, qualifier: 'visualDivision1' },
{type: #AS_DATAPOINT, qualifier: 'open_qty_total_val' }]
}
]

@UI.selectionVariant: [{
qualifier: 'KPIORDDIVSEL'

}]

@UI.headerInfo: {typeName: 'Sales Report', typeNamePlural: 'Sales Report'}
define view ZCDS_ALP_REPORT as select from ZSALESDATA_HEAD
left outer join t247 as month on  month.spras = $session.system_language
                                  and month.mnr   = substring(documentdate, 5, 2)
{

@UI.lineItem: [{position: 10 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Sales Document'
key salesdoc,
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 20 }]
key item@<EndUserText.label: 'Item',
key salesorg,
@UI.selectionField: [{position: 10 }]
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 30 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Plant'
plant,
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 40 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Plant Description'
plantdesc@<UI.selectionField: [{ position: 20 }],
@UI.selectionField: [{position: 40 }]  //Mandatory for Visual filter and changing the position changes the Visual Filters layput
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 50 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Division Description'
divisiondesc,
@UI.selectionField: [{position: 30 }]
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 60 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Distribution Channel Description'
distchldesc,
//The text that we specify as a part of Title; this will get displayed on my KPI..
@UI.dataPoint.title: 'Total Order Quantity Value'
@UI.lineItem: [{position: 70 }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Order Quantity Total Value'
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
orderqtytotalvalue as order_qty_total_val,
//We will use the document_date alias for showing the output w.r.t Sorted Order (Ascending)
//This annotation renders the Text Element to the UI
@ObjectModel.text.element: ['month_year']
//The below annotation renders only the Text to the UI front-end and the value #TEXT_ONLY is the best option
@UI.textArrangement: #TEXT_ONLY
substring(documentdate, 1, 6) as document_date@<UI.lineItem: [{ position: 80 }] @<UI.selectionField: [{ position: 50 }] @<EndUserText.label: 'Document Date',
//Date Formatting eg:- JAN-2020
concat(concat(month.ktx,'-'),substring(documentdate, 1, 4)) as
month_year,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
openqtytotalvalue as open_qty_total_val@<UI.dataPoint.title: 'Total Open Quantity Value' @<EndUserText.label: 'Open Quantity Total Value'
}
{
  "_version": "1.48.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "fiorianalytics",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:alp",
      "version": "1.17.3",
      "toolsId": "85af8d2e-e6e7-4ec1-8e23-643077416d97"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "ZCDS_ALP_REPORT_CDS_VAN": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='ZCDS_ALP_REPORT_CDS_VAN',Version='0001')/$value/",
        "type": "ODataAnnotation",
        "settings": {
          "localUri": "localService/mainService/ZCDS_ALP_REPORT_CDS_VAN.xml"
        }
      },
      "annotation": {
        "type": "ODataAnnotation",
        "uri": "annotations/annotation.xml",
        "settings": {
          "localUri": "annotations/annotation.xml"
        }
      },
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZCDS_ALP_REPORT_CDS/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [
            "ZCDS_ALP_REPORT_CDS_VAN",
            "annotation"
          ],
          "localUri": "localService/mainService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.108.9",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {},
        "sap.ushell": {},
        "sap.f": {},
        "sap.ui.comp": {},
        "sap.ui.generic.app": {},
        "sap.suite.ui.generic.template": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "fiorianalytics.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {
          "defaultBindingMode": "TwoWay",
          "defaultCountMode": "Inline",
          "refreshAfterChange": false,
          "metadataUrlParams": {
            "sap-value-list": "none"
          }
        }
      },
      "@i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": []
    },
    "routing": {
      "config": {},
      "routes": [],
      "targets": {}
    }
  },
  "sap.ui.generic.app": {
    "_version": "1.3.0",
    "settings": {
      "forceGlobalRefresh": false,
      "objectPageHeaderType": "Dynamic",
      "considerAnalyticalParameters": true,
      "showDraftToggle": false
    },
    "pages": {
      "AnalyticalListPage|ZCDS_ALP_REPORT": {
        "entitySet": "ZCDS_ALP_REPORT",
        "component": {
          "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.AnalyticalListPage",
          "list": true,
          "settings": {
            "condensedTableLayout": true,
            "showGoButtonOnFilterBar": true,
            "useBatch": false,
            "autoHide": true,
            "qualifier": "Default",
            "smartVariantManagement": false,
            "selectionPresentationVariant": {
        "selectionVariant": "KPIORDDIVSEL",
        "presentationVariant": "KPIORDDIVPV"
      },
            "tableSettings": {
              "multiSelect": false,
              "type": "AnalyticalTable"
            },
            "keyPerformanceIndicators": {}
          }
        },
        "pages": {
          "ObjectPage|ZCDS_ALP_REPORT": {
            "entitySet": "ZCDS_ALP_REPORT",
            "defaultLayoutTypeIfExternalNavigation": "MidColumnFullScreen",
            "component": {
              "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.fiori": {
    "registrationIds": [],
    "archeType": "analytical"
  }
}



Thank You,
Best Regards.

DafinTempur77
